$comment: unevaluatedProperties:false is a producer-side guard enforced at contract-test time (forbids accidental leakage of state-bearing fields like config value into the event bus). Runtime consumer decoder is intentionally lenient (decodeLenient) per ADR-202605031600 §4 metadata-only event policy — schema strictness and decoder lenience are complementary layers, not a double semantics drift.
title: event.config.entry-upserted.v1.payload
description: Metadata-only notification: subscribers MUST refetch via GET /api/v1/config/{key} to obtain the value. ref: NATS subject+bytes / Watermill payload-bytes boundary.

key.description: non-blank config key; matches ConfigEntry.Key validation

version.description: monotonically increasing; starts at 1, matches ConfigEntry.Version
